title: Remove all WIPO references and hypothetical statistics from every page

requirements.summary: Remove WIPO references and hypothetical statistics from Home page while preserving all other content and styling
acceptanceCriteria: The Home page contains no text mentioning 'WIPO' in any form.
The Home page contains no section titled 'Integration with WIPO & Sovereign IP' or similar.
Any subtitle or hero copy referencing WIPO or Sovereign IP integration has been removed.
Hypothetical statistics such as '180+ jurisdictions served' or any other unverified numeric claims do not appear on the Home page.
All other homepage sections (How It Works, Automated Filing Strategy, SME-First Infrastructure, Open Cryptographic Auditing, Hero, CTA) remain intact.
Visual theme, layout, and spacing are unchanged.

file_operations.description: Remove all references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP', and hypothetical statistics (e.g. '180+ jurisdictions served', any fabricated numeric claims) from the hero section, stats bar, feature sections, and any other prose. Delete any complete section titled 'Integration with WIPO & Sovereign IP' or similar. Preserve the Mock IP records display, How It Works section, Automated Filing Strategy, SME-First Infrastructure, Open Cryptographic Auditing, hero banner, CTA buttons, and all other content exactly as-is. Maintain the dark navy/gold theme, Playfair Display headings, Inter body text, layout structure, and spacing.

requirements.summary: Remove WIPO references and hypothetical statistics from Whitepaper page, replace WIPO section with neutral blockchain infrastructure content, and update TOC
acceptanceCriteria: The Whitepaper page contains no text mentioning 'WIPO' in any form.
The Whitepaper page contains no text mentioning 'Sovereign IP' integration or sovereign registries.
No hypothetical or unverified statistics appear anywhere in the whitepaper prose.
The table of contents sidebar accurately reflects any section title changes.
All other whitepaper sections remain intact with their full prose content.
Sticky TOC, smooth scroll, and print-to-PDF button continue to function correctly.
Dark navy/gold theme with Playfair Display headings and Inter body text is unchanged.

file_operations.description: Remove all references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP integration', and hypothetical or unverified statistics from the entire whitepaper content. Specifically remove or completely rewrite section 7 ('WIPO & Sovereign IP Integration' or similar title) and replace it with a new section titled 'Global IP Ecosystem Interoperability' that frames blockchain-as-infrastructure in neutral terms without naming WIPO or any sovereign body. Remove any inline mentions of WIPO, sovereign IP registries, or fabricated metrics throughout all other sections. Update the table of contents array (sections state) to reflect the new section title and ensure all anchor IDs match. Preserve all other whitepaper sections with their full prose content, the sticky left-sidebar TOC navigation, smooth scroll behavior using IntersectionObserver, the print-to-PDF button functionality, and the dark navy/gold theme with Playfair Display headings and Inter body text.

requirements.summary: Remove WIPO references and hypothetical statistics from Footer component while preserving theme and navigation
acceptanceCriteria: The Footer contains no text mentioning 'WIPO' in any form.
The Footer contains no text mentioning 'Sovereign IP' integration.
No hypothetical or unverified statistics appear in the Footer.
The Footer's dark navy/gold theme, copyright line, and remaining navigation links are unchanged.

file_operations.description: Remove all references to 'WIPO' and 'Sovereign IP integration' from the footer copy, taglines, feature list, and any navigation links. Remove any hypothetical or unverified statistics if present. Preserve the footer's dark navy/gold theme, IPGT branding, copyright line with dynamic year, navigation links (Home, IP Database, Whitepaper), platform feature list (excluding any WIPO-related items), and the caffeine.ai attribution link. Maintain the existing footer layout and styling.

requirements.summary: Audit and remove any remaining WIPO references and hypothetical statistics from Header, IPDatabase, RegisterIP, and other frontend files
acceptanceCriteria: No frontend file outside of Whitepaper.tsx and Home.tsx contains any reference to 'WIPO' or 'Sovereign IP'.
No frontend file contains hypothetical or unverified statistics.
Mock IP records in IPDatabase.tsx remain completely intact.
No visual styling or functionality changes are introduced.

file_operations.description: Audit the Header component for any references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP integration', or hypothetical statistics (e.g. '180+ jurisdictions served'). Remove all such references if found. Do not modify the IPGT logo, navigation links, authenticated user display name, Internet Identity login/logout button, or any visual styling.

Audit the IPDatabase page for any references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP integration', or hypothetical statistics in headings, descriptions, or UI copy. Remove all such references if found. Preserve the Mock IP records data exactly as-is (do not modify mockIPs array content). Maintain the searchable, filterable IP record browser, pagination, category/jurisdiction filters, and detail modal functionality. Do not change any visual styling or component behavior.

Audit the RegisterIP page for any references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP integration', or hypothetical statistics in form labels, help text, headings, or descriptions. Remove all such references if found. Preserve the IP registration form functionality including SHA-256 file hashing, balance checks, ExternalBlob upload with progress tracking, and the success modal. Do not modify form fields, validation logic, or visual styling.

Audit the CoinDashboard page for any references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP integration', or hypothetical statistics in headings, descriptions, or token metadata. Remove all such references if found. Preserve the authenticated dashboard functionality displaying IPGT token balance, network stats, token metadata, and the transfer form. Do not change any functionality or visual styling.

Audit the TokenStats component for any references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP integration', or hypothetical statistics in labels or descriptions. Remove all such references if found. Preserve the display of user balance, circulating supply, and total burned tokens in both compact inline and full grid card layouts. Do not modify data fetching, formatting, or visual styling.

Audit the IPCard component for any references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP integration', or hypothetical statistics in the rendered content. Remove all such references if found. Preserve the compact card layout displaying IP record ID, category badge, title, description, jurisdiction, registration date, and truncated document hash. Do not modify component props, styling, or rendering logic.

Audit the IPDetailModal component for any references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP integration', or hypothetical statistics in field labels or descriptions. Remove all such references if found. Preserve the modal dialog displaying full IP record details including all metadata fields, copyable SHA-256 hash, and optional document download link. Do not modify modal functionality or visual styling.

Audit the RegistrationSuccessModal component for any references to 'WIPO', 'Sovereign IP integration', or hypothetical statistics in confirmation messages. Remove all such references if found. Preserve the confirmation modal displaying the new IP record ID and the amount of IPGT tokens burned. Do not modify modal functionality or visual styling.
